title: Replace PWA icon with user-provided image and remove yellow pulsing dot from Globe tab

requirements.summary: Replace the generated PWA icon images with the user-provided image from the ICP storage URL and update all manifest and HTML references
acceptanceCriteria: The user-provided image URL is downloaded and saved as a static asset in frontend/public/
manifest.json icon entries (256px and 512px) reference the new image file
No previously generated PWA icon assets remain referenced in manifest.json or index.html
The app installs with the correct custom icon on supported devices

file_operations.description: Download the user-provided image from https://wkeve-6yaaa-aaaaf-qahcq-cai.raw.icp0.io/storage?contentId=kl67x-j6c5g-ptso3-xq4fe-kmcuc-trzl2-nzxqt-qjedv-j3y4m-3746e-tqe-image-29480 and save it as antenna-icon.png in frontend/public/. This will serve as the source PWA icon for all sizes.

Update the icons array in manifest.json to reference the new antenna-icon.png file for both 256x256 and 512x512 icon entries. Remove references to any previously generated PWA icon assets (fighter-jet-logo.dim_256x256.png and pwa-player-mascot.dim_512x512.png).

Update any icon or image references in index.html (apple-touch-icon meta tags, favicon link tags, etc.) to point to the new antenna-icon.png file. Remove references to previously generated icon assets if present.

requirements.summary: Remove the yellow pulsing dot/marker from the Globe tab (GlobeView component)
acceptanceCriteria: No yellow pulsing dot or animated marker is rendered on the globe in the Globe tab (GlobeView)
Station location points on the globe remain functional and clickable if applicable, only the yellow pulsing animation is removed
The globe renders without any pulsing dot animation at any station coordinate

file_operations.description: Remove the yellow pulsing dot marker from the GlobeView 3D globe. Locate and delete or comment out the mesh/geometry/material code that renders the animated pulsing marker at station coordinates. Ensure station location points remain clickable and functional while removing only the pulsing animation visual.
